details: Lights out! The Grand Prix gets underway.
Weather update: Track condition is now DRY. Air Temp: 21.4°C.
Lando Norris performs an overtake on Lewis Hamilton for P4.
Oscar Piastri performs an overtake on Lando Norris for P5.
